title: Micro Travel Grants: May round is now open
excerpt: Applications are open for the May round. This highlighted update stays at the top until the next important announcement is pinned.
body: Applications are open for the May round of the #ScienceForUkraine Micro Travel Grant Programme. This highlighted update stays at the top of the page until the next important announcement is pinned in its place.

title: New funding opportunities for Ukrainian researchers
excerpt: A new set of fellowships, research visits, and institutional support opportunities is now available.
body: A new set of fellowships, research visits, and institutional support opportunities is now available. See the Funding Programmes and Other Support page for the full, regularly updated list.

title: Volunteer onboarding call
excerpt: Join us for an onboarding call for new volunteers. We will introduce ongoing projects, tools, and ways to get involved.
body:
Join us for an onboarding call for new volunteers. We will introduce ongoing projects, tools, and ways to get involved.

Thank you for your interest!

title: Request changes to a support listing
excerpt: How to request updates or corrections to an existing support listing.
body: If a listing needs to be corrected, updated, or removed, email data@scienceforukraine.eu with the listing details and the change you'd like made.

title: Partner update
excerpt: Updates from our partner network and collaboration highlights.
body: Updates from our partner network and collaboration highlights. See the Our Partners page for the current list of organisations supporting #ScienceForUkraine.

title: Micro Travel Grant Programme relaunched for 2026
excerpt: The MTG programme has reopened with a renewed focus on early-career scholars based in Ukraine.
body: The MTG 2026 programme has been reopened since February 2, 2026 and renewed with a focus on supporting early-career scholars based in Ukraine. See the Micro Travel Grants page for full rules and how to apply.
